title: WNBA champion Lexie Brown opens up on 'culture shift' since Caitlin Clark's arrival
description: Seattle Storm's Lexie Brown says the WNBA has skyrocketed since Caitlin Clark's 2024 arrival, crediting new fans and financial growth in the league.
content: Seattle Storm player Lexie Brown has been in the WNBA since 2018, and won a championship with the Chicago Sky in 2021. In recent years, she's taken notice of how the culture and image of the WNBA has… [+4714 chars]
